Toonify MCP

Primary URL: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/
Repository: https://github.com/PCIRCLE-AI/toonify-mcp
License: MIT

Summary
- Toonify MCP is a local-first Claude Code plugin and MCP server.
- Compresses large JSON, CSV, YAML, API responses, debug output, and source files before they enter the context window.
- Plugin mode runs automatically in the background with no change to the normal Claude Code workflow.

Best for
- Large structured payloads: JSON, CSV, YAML, API responses
- Test failures, stack traces, compiler diagnostics, and repetitive build or lint output
- Whole source-file reads for TypeScript, Python, Go, and PHP

Limitations
- Short prose
- Very small files
- Content that depends heavily on exact original formatting

Install
- Plugin mode: clone the repo, build it, install it locally, then run `toonify-mcp setup`
- MCP mode: run `toonify-mcp setup mcp`

Verification
- `toonify-mcp setup` handles local marketplace setup plus install, update, or re-enable
- `toonify-mcp doctor` validates local install
- `toonify-mcp status` shows the latest optimized or skipped outcome
- `claude mcp list` can confirm MCP connectivity when you use MCP mode

Public pages
- Landing page: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/
- Traditional Chinese landing page: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/index-zh.html
- Benchmarks: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/benchmarks.html
- Traditional Chinese benchmarks: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/benchmarks-zh.html
- Privacy policy: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/privacy.html
- Terms of service: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/terms.html

Measured structured-data benchmark snapshot
- 12 fixtures
- 48.1% average savings
- 24.5-66.3% observed range

For a richer machine-readable summary, see: https://toonify.pcircle.ai/llms-full.txt
